title: One-Way Ticket
writer: Joseph Anthony, Oliver H.P. Garrett, Vincent Lawrence
actors: Lloyd Nolan, Peggy Conklin, Walter Connolly
plot: Jerry, the son of a bank depositor who was cheated out of his savings, is sent to prison after he robs the bank of the exact sum his father lost. Captain Bill Bourne lives on the grounds of the prison along with his wife, their da...
